record.field: Sales Representative - Techrise (Abu Dhabi, UAE) Client meetings, deal closing, and relationship building. Competitive salary + project-based commission.

section.p: Techrise is a specialized technology company and an accredited Odoo partner based in Abu Dhabi, UAE. We help businesses transform their operations through smart digital solutions — from ERP implementation and web development to mobile applications and cloud hosting. We're growing fast and looking for driven individuals to join our team.

We are looking for a motivated Sales Representative to join our team in Abu Dhabi. You will be the face of Techrise — meeting potential clients, understanding their business needs, presenting our solutions, and closing deals. This is a high-impact role with direct influence on the company's growth.

ul.li: Identify and reach out to potential clients through various channels (calls, emails, networking, social media)
Conduct face-to-face meetings and presentations to showcase Techrise's solutions and services
Understand client business requirements and map them to our ERP, web, mobile, and hosting solutions
Prepare and present proposals, quotations, and negotiate contracts to close deals
Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with clients to ensure repeat business
Collaborate with the technical team to ensure smooth project handover after deal closure
Track sales activities, pipeline, and revenue targets using the CRM system
2+ years of experience in B2B sales, preferably in IT services, ERP solutions, or technology consulting
Excellent communication and presentation skills in English
Hindi/Urdu speaking candidates are strongly preferred
Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets
Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to build rapport quickly
Self-motivated, target-driven, and comfortable with a commission-based structure
Familiarity with CRM tools and sales processes
Must be based in or willing to relocate to Abu Dhabi, UAE
Knowledge of Odoo ERP or similar enterprise software
Experience selling to SMEs in the Middle East market
Arabic language skills (a plus, not required)
Existing network of business contacts in UAE
Competitive fixed salary based on experience
Attractive commission on every closed project — your earnings grow with your success
Opportunity to work with cutting-edge technology and international clients
A dynamic, supportive, and fast-growing work environment
Career growth opportunities as the company expands

section.p: Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates — On-site
